---
title: "test_chroma_config.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\test_chroma_config.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.42
style_score: 9.59
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.23
---

## Intent
The `test_chroma_config.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [chromadb.config](file://chromadb.config)
- [traceback](file://traceback)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
